questionText: Did you have emissions reduction initiatives that were active within the reporting year?
questionKo: 보고 연도 내에 활동한 배출량 감축 이니셔티브가 있습니까?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: The answer to this question enables CDP data users to understand your organization's commitment to reducing emissions beyond business-as-usual scenario (beyond standard maintenance/replacement activities).

columns.text: Emissions reduction initiatives that were active within the reporting year
options: No, but plan to start investigating them within the next two years
No, and do not plan to implement any within the next two years

아니요, do 아니요t plan implement 하나 이상 내 next two 연도s

options: Important but not an immediate business priority
Judged to be unimportant, explanation provided

columns.text: Explain why you did not have active emissions reduction initiatives within the reporting year
columns.textKo: 설명 why 귀사 did 아니요t have active 배출량 reduction initiatives 내 보고연도

guidance.text:
General 
It is acknowledged that maintenance activities can have a beneficial impact on carbon emissions. Only activities that have either been part of a defined program of emissions reduction activities or where additional investment beyond standard maintenance/replacement has been made for the purposes of reducing emissions should be reported here.
It is acknowledged that diverse companies often have large number of emissions reduction initiatives operating over varying time periods and scales. You should answer this question in the context of the reporting year. This could include initiatives that have become operational within the reporting year (e.g. installation of new equipment, or instigation of new operational practices) or commitments that have been made in the reporting year (e.g. investments made which are yet to become fully operational). 
If you are reporting a market-based Scope 2 figure, you can reflect any renewable energy purchasing policies as a component of emissions reduction activities. Please bear in mind, however, that if you are already buying renewable energy instruments and accounting for them at a zero emissions factor, then emissions reduction activities can only be achieved as "additional purchases" to what you are already doing. Therefore, emissions reduction activities are established by comparing what you have done in the previous year and what you are proposing to do in the future.
Only initiatives to reduce CO2e emissions within your organization's value chain (i.e. Scope 1, Scope 2 and/or Scope 3) should be reported here.
Measures taken to reduce Scope 3 emissions may be reported here.
Initiatives do not need to relate to specific targets reported in 7.53.1 and 7.53.2.
Emissions reduction initiatives that were active within the reporting year (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if you implemented, planned or investigated any initiatives, even if you cannot calculate CO2 savings. Provide as much information as possible in the following questions.
Explain why you did not have active emissions reduction initiatives within the reporting year (column 3) 
If you do not have emissions reduction initiatives active in the reporting year because you have not identified any, provide more information regarding your process for identifying potential initiatives and explain why it has resulted in no initiatives being investigated.
guidance.textKo:
일반 
유지보수 활동은 탄소 배출에 유익한 영향을 미칠 수 있다는 것이 인정됩니다. 정의된 배출 감소 활동 프로그램의 일부이거나 배출 감소를 목적으로 표준 유지 관리/교체 이상의 추가 투자가 이루어진 활동만 여기에 보고해야 합니다.
다양한 기업이 다양한 기간과 규모에 걸쳐 수많은 배출 감소 계획을 운영하는 경우가 많다는 것은 인정됩니다. 보고연도의 맥락에서 이 문항에 답해야 합니다. 여기에는 보고연도 내에 운영된 계획(예: 새 장비 설치 또는 새로운 운영 관행 도입) 또는 보고연도에 이루어진 약속(예: 아직 완전히 운영되지 않은 투자)이 포함될 수 있습니다. 
시장 기반 Scope 2 수치를 보고하는 경우 재생 에너지 구매 정책을 배출 감소 활동의 구성 요소로 반영할 수 있습니다. 그러나 이미 재생 에너지 기기를 구매하고 배출 계수를 0으로 계산하는 경우 배출 감소 활동은 이미 수행 중인 작업에 대한 "추가 구매"로만 달성될 수 있다는 점을 명심하십시오. 따라서 전년도에 수행한 활동과 향후 계획하고 있는 활동을 비교하여 배출 저감 활동을 수립합니다.
조직의 가치 사슬(예: Scope 1, Scope 2 및/또는 Scope 3) 내에서 CO2e 배출을 줄이기 위한 계획만 여기에 보고해야 합니다.
Scope 3 배출을 줄이기 위해 취한 조치는 여기에서 보고될 수 있습니다.
계획은 7.53.1 및 7.53.2에 보고된 특정 목표와 관련될 필요가 없습니다.
보고연도 내에 활성화된 배출 감소 계획(1열) 
CO2 절감액을 계산할 수 없더라도 이니셔티브를 구현, 계획 또는 조사한 경우 "예"를 선택하십시오. 다음 문항에 가능한 한 많은 정보를 제공하십시오.
보고연도 내에 적극적인 배출 감소 계획이 없었던 이유를 설명하십시오(3열). 
식별되지 않아 보고연도에 활성화된 배출 감소 이니셔티브가 없는 경우 잠재적인 이니셔티브를 식별하는 프로세스에 대한 자세한 정보를 제공하고 조사 목표 이니셔티브가 없는 이유를 설명하십시오.
